calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVEN P. SHAW of Renne Sloan Holtzman Sakai, Public Law Group, Tel No. (415) 678-3800 appearing for Petitioner the Housing Authority of the City and County of San Francisco;
Atty. DAVID L. BARBER of Davis, Cowell & Bowe, LLP, Tel No. (415) 597-7200 appearing for the Respondent United Association Of Journeymen And Apprentices Of The Plumbing And Pipefitting Industry Of The United States And Canada, Local 38.

The Court required parties to appear. The Court disclosed to parties that the Court has previously retained the firm Renne Sloan Holtzman and Sakai as counsel, and that those services concluded in 2013. The Court indicated it does not find a basis to recuse itself under the rules of judicial conduct. The parties indicated no objection to the Court proceeding on this matter. Matter argued by counsel and submitted. The Court takes PETITIONER THE HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY'S Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award under submission. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Continued To Jan-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVEN P. SHAW of Renne, Sloan, Holtzman, Sakai, Public Law Group, Tel No. (415) 678-3800 appearing for the Petitioner;
Atty. DAVID L. BARBER of Davis, Cowell & Bowe, LLP, Tel No. (415) 597-7200 appearing for the Respondent.

Respondent filed a CCP 170.6 peremptory challenge against the Hon. A. James Robertson, II. The Court continued this matter to January 29, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 to be heard by the Hon. Ernest H. Goldsmith. Petitioner's counsel informed the Court that Judge Goldsmith may end up making certain disclosures regarding this case. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Continued To Jan-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: PETITIONER THE HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award is continued per the agreement of parties to January 16, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-02-2015 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award is continued on the Court's own motion to January 7, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Continued To Jan-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER THE HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Hearing On Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award is continued on the Court's own motion to January 2, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
